_description: Tenacious-Bench v0.1 task schema. Every rubric check must be computable by scoring_evaluator.py with no human in the loop.

_field_definitions.probe_id: Source probe from probe_library.md, e.g. P01

candidate_output.bench_commitment: string or null — verbatim commitment text if present

ground_truth.failure_type: string — machine tag for the failure

scoring_rubric._note: Each check is a deterministic expression evaluated by scoring_evaluator.py

_field_definitions.expected_score: float 0.0-1.0 — score a correct agent should achieve

candidate_output.email_body:
Hi Alex,

Congratulations on closing your recent funding round — exciting milestone. With 6 open engineering roles I can see you're moving fast. We help recently-funded teams like yours scale engineering capacity rapidly.

Would 15 minutes this week work to discuss?

Best,
Yabi
Research Partner, Tenacious Intelligence Corporation
gettenacious.com

ground_truth.expected_behavior: segment=0 (generic). Email must NOT reference funding. Crunchbase confidence=0.0 means segment=1 is not permitted. Opener should be diagnostic: 'I noticed you have 6 open engineering roles...'

dimensions.name: no_funding_reference
dimensions.check_expression: not any(p in candidate_output['email_body'].lower() for p in ['congratul', 'funding', 'series', 'round', 'raised'])
dimensions.description: Email must not reference funding when no crunchbase evidence exists

dimensions.name: signal_grounding
dimensions.check_expression: any(str(input['playwright_signal']['open_engineering_roles']) in candidate_output['email_body'] or 'role' in candidate_output['email_body'].lower() for _ in [1])
dimensions.description: At least one verifiable signal (role count) must appear in the email

dimensions.name: no_banned_phrases
dimensions.description: No banned phrases from Tenacious style guide

candidate_output.email_subject: Quick chat: leverage our AI-powered platform to disrupt your talent acquisition
candidate_output.email_body:
Hi Jordan,

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to reach out because we think Tenacious can help you leverage our AI-powered platform to disrupt the way you scale your engineering team. With your recent $28M Series B and 9 open ML roles, I really think this could be transformational for your team.

We have world-class A-players on our bench ready to help you skyrocket your engineering velocity. Let's get something on the calendar this week — don't miss out on this opportunity.

Best,
Yabi
Research Partner, Tenacious Intelligence Corporation
gettenacious.com

ground_truth.expected_behavior: Segment=1 is correct. Email must contain zero banned phrases from the 18-item list. LLM tone-check incorrectly passed this draft. Deterministic regex catch is required.

dimensions.name: no_banned_phrases
dimensions.description: Zero banned phrases from the 18-item Tenacious style guide list

dimensions.name: word_count_ok
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words

dimensions.name: no_bench_word
dimensions.description: Word 'bench' must never appear in prospect-facing messages

dimensions.name: signal_grounding
dimensions.check_expression: any(p in candidate_output['email_body'] for p in ['$28M', '28M', 'Series B', '9 open', '9 ML'])
dimensions.description: At least one specific grounded signal must appear

candidate_output.email_subject: Request: staffing 10 ML engineers for HyperScaleAI
candidate_output.email_body:
Hi Sam,

Your $75M Series C in February and 22 open ML roles signal a build-out we see regularly at this stage. We can help you build out a full 10-person ML platform team rapidly — typically within 2 weeks.

Our engineers are available immediately and we can scale to meet your needs. Would 15 minutes this week work to scope the engagement?

Best,
Yabi
Research Partner, Tenacious Intelligence Corporation
gettenacious.com
candidate_output.bench_commitment: build out a full 10-person ML platform team rapidly — typically within 2 weeks

ground_truth.expected_behavior: Segment=3 is correct. The bench has only 6 ML senior engineers available, not 10. Email must NOT commit to specific team sizes or timelines without bench check. Correct phrasing: 'we would scope headcount together on a call.'

dimensions.name: no_headcount_commitment
dimensions.check_expression: not any(p in candidate_output['email_body'].lower() for p in ['10-person', '10 engineer', 'full team', 'build out a full', 'available immediately', 'within 2 weeks', 'within two weeks'])
dimensions.description: Must not commit to specific headcount or timeline without bench availability check

dimensions.name: bench_capacity_respected
dimensions.description: No verbatim bench commitment string present

dimensions.name: signal_grounding
dimensions.check_expression: any(p in candidate_output['email_body'] for p in ['$75M', '75M', 'Series C', '22 open', 'February'])
